nav.metaDescription: Generate Xiaohongshu posts in your voice.

home.title: Turn your ideas into ready-to-post content
home.subtitle: Generate Xiaohongshu posts in your voice, then copy, paste, and publish.
home.step1Desc: Add the photo or video you want to post about.
home.step2Desc: Pick your identity, tone, and style — or let AI ask you directly.
home.step3Desc: Get a ready-to-post caption, copy it, and publish on Xiaohongshu.
home.individualDesc: Merchants generate posts for their own brand — upload a product photo or video, answer a few quick questions, and get a consistent, ready-to-publish post.
home.commercialDesc: For brands: let your customers generate a post about your product and join a lucky draw.

directory.title: Lucky Draw Directory
directory.subtitle: Browse active campaigns and join a lucky draw.
directory.empty: No active campaigns right now — check back soon.

auth.name: Name
auth.error: Something went wrong. Please check your details and try again.

individual.title: For Your Own Business
individual.freeTextPlaceholder: Anything else you want included in the post...
individual.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
individual.quotaRemaining: {count, plural, =0 {No free posts left} one {# free post left} other {# free posts left}}
individual.aiUnavailable: AI generation is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
individual.aiUnavailableAdmin: AI generation is unavailable — the Anthropic API credit balance is too low. Please top up in the console.
individual.uploadCta: Click to upload a photo or video
individual.brandProfileHint: Set this up once, and every post you generate afterward stays consistent instead of switching to a different style each time.
individual.brandDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g. We're a small handmade-jewelry shop with a minimalist look...
individual.styleSampleHint: Paste the text of a post you've published before — AI will learn your wording and tone (pasting a link to auto-fetch isn't supported yet).
individual.styleSamplePlaceholder: Paste the text content of a post you've published before...
individual.brandImagesLabel: Brand image assets (optional, for reuse later)

commercial.freeTextPlaceholder: Share a detail you want included...
commercial.linkPlaceholder: Paste your Xiaohongshu post link here
commercial.contactRequiredLabel: Enter your name and phone number to generate the post
commercial.submitted: Thanks! Your entry has been recorded.
commercial.entryCount: You now have {count, plural, one {# lucky draw entry} other {# lucky draw entries}} for this campaign.
commercial.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
commercial.aiUnavailable: This feature is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
commercial.stylingPhoto: Styling your photo with the brand's look...
commercial.styledPhotoReady: Your photo now has the brand's style — download it to use when you post on Xiaohongshu.
commercial.chooseTitle: Pick a title (usable as the XHS title field when posting):
commercial.goToXHSHint: Your photo has been downloaded and the caption copied — the Xiaohongshu publish page is now open. Just upload the downloaded photo and paste the caption to post.

admin.title: Admin
admin.confirmDelete: Delete this campaign? This cannot be undone.
admin.cannotDelete: This campaign has submissions and cannot be deleted. Deactivate it instead.
admin.testPhotoHint: Only tests the photo beautify effect — no caption is generated, no caption-related AI cost.
admin.formProductDescriptionPlaceholder: What does this product/brand actually do? (helps AI connect it naturally to any photo)
admin.formBrandColorLabel: Brand color (applies a matching style to customer photos)
admin.formLogoLabel: Brand logo (optional — added as a watermark badge on customer photos)
admin.formLogoWatermarkToggle: Overlay logo watermark on customer photos
admin.formPrizesHint: Prizes (e.g. 1st, 2nd, 3rd place) — name, description, and photo per prize. Optional.
admin.formCustomizeHint: Optional: customize each questionnaire question. Leave a question's text and answers blank to use the default for that question.
admin.formIdentityQPlaceholder: Identity question text, e.g. Which one feels more like you?
admin.formToneQPlaceholder: Tone question text, e.g. Pick a tone
admin.formStyleQPlaceholder: Style question text, e.g. Pick a style
admin.subTitle: Title
admin.notifyCopyHint: Copy a reminder message to paste into WeChat/SMS to the user
admin.notifyMessage: Hi — we saw you generated a post for the "{campaign}" campaign but haven't submitted your posted link yet. Let us know if you need any help!

upgrade.title: You've used all your free posts
upgrade.subtitle: Paid plans are coming soon so you can create more. Check back here once they're live.
